Leonardo AI Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

AI image generation platform popular with game artists and designers.

MakerLeonardo AI
CategoryAI Image Generators
PricingFree daily credits; paid plans from $12/mo
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit Leonardo AI →

Best for

Game developers and designers needing specific asset styles.

Pros

  • Generous daily free credits
  • Fine-tuned models for game assets, icons, and textures
  • Built-in upscaling and canvas editing

Cons

  • Interface has a steeper learning curve than simpler tools
  • Best models require a paid plan

Alternatives to Leonardo AI

Midjourney

One of the most popular AI image generators, known for highly artistic, polished output.

DALL-E

OpenAI's image generator, built directly into ChatGPT.

Runway

Professional-grade AI video generation and editing suite.
